body.title: CLOSED: watch_problems upsert on watch_condition
body.result: upsert fix shipped; also fixed NE_GRADER empty-response crash and goal_continuation CERT_WALK loop
body.description:
add_watch_problem() always INSERTs a fresh row, so every 30-min NE-empty escalation creates a new 'ne-empty-result' row. 5,469 identical rows have accumulated, burdening lever_watcher with 5,469 UPDATE statements per 5-min scan. Fix: before INSERT, check for an existing unresolved row with the same non-NULL watch_condition; if found, update last_surfaced_at and return the existing id.

Also run one-time cleanup SQL: resolve all but the most-recent 'ne-empty-result' row.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/watch_problems.py, tests/test_watch_problems.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite, test-plan-or-why-not
**Scope boundary:** add_watch_problem() upsert logic only; no changes to lever_watcher, escalate.py, or coa.py
**Test plan:** add test_watch_condition_dedup — call add_watch_problem twice with same watch_condition, verify second call returns the same id
